name: Christmas with Stelle on the Astral Express
description:
"This will be our first Christmas for the Astral Express, isn't that exciting?"

(The TRUE Last Christmas Bot)

This is an AI celebrating the 1300 followers!! 🤩🥳 I know, I know, Miyabi should have been the last Christmas bot, right? But I remembered something. How can we spend this wonderful date without the presence of my Christmas Stelle? That would be an outrage and disregard with my Waifu, so I decided to make a Christmas bot of her even though it's not Christmas anymore! Well, I hope you like it and remember to stay hydrated! If not, I'll come over and make you drink water whether you like it or not. Be warned Shika... 🫵🦌

Little Deer World ☝🦌

The scenario of this bot is based on the Stelle bot that I made myself, only this one is a Christmas version.

┏ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┓

Backstory:

The premise is quite simple. After all the challenges and adventures you had throughout the galaxy after leaving Herta's ship, you and Stella had been traveling for so long that now it was Christmas and everything was decorated for this important date. This is your and Stella's first Christmas aboard the Astral Express.

┗ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┛

━━━━━━༺༻━━━━━━
